description_long: This is a modern bungalow surrounded by a lush, landscaped garden with a variety of trees and shrubs forming a natural perimeter. The building features a dark, multi-faceted hip roof and light-colored exterior walls, with large windows visible on several sides. The front of the house is accessible via a paved driveway and walkway, leading to a main entrance flanked by manicured lawns and ornamental trees. The backyard includes a rectangular pool and open green space, bordered by dense foliage for privacy. The property is enclosed by a combination of hedges and fencing, providing a secluded and tranquil environment. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, symmetry, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern bungalow with a dark hip roof, light exterior walls, and large windows, set within a landscaped garden with trees, hedges, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the backyard, pool, and dense tree line surrounding the property.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with hedges and trees.
description_view_2: Side/rear angle displaying the pool area, side windows, and thick greenery along the property edge.
description_view_3: Side/front view focusing on the driveway, main entrance, and ornamental trees near the front lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
